task_completion.description: Verifies that a tracking module named 'Incident_Recon' was created in GPredict.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A GPredict module window or tab explicitly labeled 'Incident_Recon' is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verifies that the Tromso ground station is configured and selected for the module.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The name 'Tromso' appears as the active ground station in the 'Incident_Recon' module's header, map view, or configuration settings.

task_completion.description: Verifies that SUOMI NPP and DMSP 5D-3 F18 are added to the tracking module.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The satellite list, radar, or map within the 'Incident_Recon' module clearly displays 'SUOMI NPP' and 'DMSP 5D-3 F18' (or 'USA 210').

task_completion.description: Verifies that the application is configured to display UTC time.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The time display in the GPredict interface shows 'UTC' instead of a local timezone abbreviation (e.g., in the module header or status bar).

task_completion.description: Verifies that the simulation time is set to Feb 28, 2026, 14:30:00 UTC with real-time tracking disabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The GPredict Time Controller window is open and shows manual time control (real-time tracking paused or disabled), with the date set to '2026-02-28' and time to '14:30:00' (or 14:30).

task_completion.description: Verifies that a screenshot of the desktop was saved to the correct path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal command (e.g., using scrot, import, or gnome-screenshot) or a GUI save dialog confirming the image is saved exactly to '/home/ga/incident_reconstruction.png'.

integrity.description: Verifies the agent interacted with the actual GPredict GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The GPredict application window is open, and menus/dialogs are actively used, rather than the agent just editing configuration files in a text editor.

integrity.description: Verifies the agent used GPredict's internal time controller.
integrity.visual_evidence: The GPredict Time Controller dialog is visible and used to change the time, rather than the agent changing the system-wide OS clock.

integrity.description: Verifies the screenshot was actually captured from the current desktop state.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent executes a screenshot command or uses a screenshot tool capturing the visible GPredict setup, rather than downloading or moving a pre-existing image file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Tromso ground station coordinates: 69.6625 N, 18.9408 E, 130m altitude. Required satellites: SUOMI NPP (NORAD 37849) and DMSP 5D-3 F18 / USA 210 (NORAD 35951). Target date: 2026-02-28. Target time: 14:30 UTC. Expected screenshot path: /home/ga/incident_reconstruction.png.
